metadata.description: Production-ready Claude Code plugin marketplace with autonomous agents, power skills, smart hooks, and custom commands

plugins.name: analyzer
plugins.description: Code analysis and metrics specialist. Use for codebase analysis, complexity metrics, dependency analysis, and generating insights about code quality and structure.

plugins.description: Fully autonomous development assistant that handles all technical tasks including git operations without asking for permission. Use for feature implementation, bug fixes, refactoring, and code changes that need commits.

plugins.description: Backend development specialist for APIs, databases, server-side logic, and system integration. Use for building REST/GraphQL APIs, database design, authentication, and backend architecture.

plugins.name: mentor
plugins.description: Educational mentor for teaching programming concepts, best practices, and guiding learning. Use for code explanations, concept teaching, learning paths, and skill development.

plugins.name: performance-engineer
plugins.description: Performance optimization specialist for identifying bottlenecks and improving speed. Use for performance analysis, profiling, optimization, and scalability improvements.

plugins.name: project-planner
plugins.description: Use this agent before starting any project or complex task. It analyzes requirements, explores the codebase, identifies dependencies, assesses risks, and creates a detailed execution plan. Invoke this agent when you need to plan before coding, understand project scope, or create a roadmap.

plugins.name: qa-engineer
plugins.description: Quality assurance specialist for test strategy, test automation, and comprehensive quality assessment. Use for creating test plans, building test suites, and ensuring software quality.

plugins.name: refactor-assistant
plugins.description: name: refactor-assistant

plugins.name: refactorer
plugins.description: Code refactoring specialist focused on improving code structure and maintainability. Use for cleaning up technical debt, improving code quality, and systematic refactoring.

plugins.name: rollback-planner
plugins.description: Agent plugin for rollback-planner

plugins.name: root-cause-tracing
plugins.description: Trace bugs backward to their origin, not just symptoms

plugins.name: scope-boundary-checker
plugins.description: Agent plugin for scope-boundary-checker

plugins.name: security-analyst
plugins.description: Security specialist for vulnerability assessment, threat modeling, and secure code review. Use for security audits, penetration testing guidance, and implementing security best practices.

plugins.name: security-scanner
plugins.description: name: security-scanner

plugins.name: sequential-thinker
plugins.description: Specialized in breaking down complex problems into logical, sequential steps with clear reasoning. Use for complex problem-solving, architectural decisions, or when you need structured analytical thinking.

plugins.name: setup-orchestrator
plugins.description: Meta-agent that orchestrates and tracks the complete Claude Code configuration setup process. Use this agent to continue setup work across sessions, track progress, and understand what was done vs what needs to be done. Invoke when continuing the configuration setup or troubleshooting setup issues.

plugins.name: smart-routing
plugins.description: Model-specific task routing with Opus for planning, Sonnet for execution, Haiku for quick tasks

plugins.name: smithery-deployment-agent
plugins.description: Manages Canvas Student MCP Server deployment to Smithery AI platform. Use for publishing servers, managing Cloudflare workers, and handling OAuth configuration on ariff.dev domain.

plugins.name: subagent-driven-development
plugins.description: Use fresh agents for focused subtasks to avoid context pollution
